title: Siemens U273 B6 empirical diode AC sweep
status: B6 bridge integrated with Siemens empirical diode law; VCMD is still externally imposed for this subcircuit sweep
warning: This replaces placeholder Shockley diode parameters with the Siemens U_D/I_D/r_d law. It still does not close the full B11 feedback loop, transistor B6 stages, or final C4/C6/R7/R8 settings.
diodeLaw: Applied to each B6 schematic diode D1-D4. The direct two-diode 1 V check is separate from the full B6 VCMD sweep because R10/R9 and bridge loading reduce diode path voltage.

directTwoDiodeSeriesCheck1V.note: Direct check only: two identical empirical diode symbols in series with 1 V total. This is not the same as VCMD=1 V in the full B6 netlist because R10/R9 and bridge loading reduce diode path voltage.

scenarios.name: empirical_cmd_ideal_c4c6_0
scenarios.note: Command node held at AC ground; empirical U273 bridge diode law.

scenarios.name: empirical_cmd_10k_c4c6_0
scenarios.note: Finite B11 output impedance sensitivity; empirical U273 bridge diode law.

scenarios.name: empirical_cmd_100k_c4c6_0
scenarios.note: Finite B11 output impedance sensitivity; empirical U273 bridge diode law.

scenarios.name: empirical_cmd_open_c4c6_0
scenarios.note: Command port left open in AC; empirical U273 bridge diode law.

siemensExampleCheckAtVcmd1.expectedOrder: Siemens example gives I1 ~= 18.33 uA for 1 V across the bridge diode calculation. In this extracted B6 subcircuit, VCMD=1 V produces lower diode path voltage through R10/R9 and passive loading.
